title: SysBio FAIRplex Gene Expression Browser
body:
Explore interactive visualizations of differential gene expression within human tissues derived from the Accelerating Medicines Partnership (AMP) programs. Differential expression analyses were performed on harmonized pseudobulked single-cell or single nucleus RNA-sequencing (RNA-seq) data from AMP AD, AMP CMD, AMP PDRD, and AMP RA/SLE. The current interface is a small proof of concept that will be expanded with additional datasets in the future. Begin by selecting a type of comparison, AMPs, and cell type to visualize results. The volcano plot shows all differentially expressed genes between the two groups. Hover for more information about each differentially expressed gene, and click to view details in the table below. View top enriched annotations for all upregulated or downregulated genes using the module at the bottom of the page. Learn more about the underlying datasets or data harmonization procedures. 

Abbreviations: AD-Alzheimer's disease, Astro-astrocyte, CMD-common metabolic disease, Endo-endothelial cell, Micro PVM-microglia or perivascular macrophages, Oligo-oligodendrocyte, OPC-oligodendrocyte progenitor cell, PDRD-Parkinson's disease and related disorders, RASLE-rheumatoid arthritis or systemic lupus erythematosus.
